title: Sum Up
prompt: Write a function called sumup that takes 2 parameters and returns their sum.

title: Next To
prompt: Write a function called next_to that takes 2 parameters and returns a string of the 2 values next to each other.

title: nX Next To Y
prompt:
Write a function called nx_next_to_y that takes 3 parameters and returns a string of X n number of times next to Y.
For example, nx_next_to_y(3, 'a', 'b') should return 'aaab'.

title: Difference
prompt: Write a function called difference that returns a - b.

title: n in between
prompt:
Write a function called nbetween that returns n number of spaces in between 2 other arguments.
For example, nbetween(3, 'a', 'b') should return 'a   b'.

title: is even
prompt: Write a function called is_even that returns True when n is even, otherwise False.

title: max of three
prompt: Write a function called max_of_three that returns the largest of 3 numbers.

title: factorial
prompt: Write a function called factorial that returns n! for n >= 0.

title: reverse text
prompt: Write a function called reverse_text that returns the text reversed.

title: count vowels
prompt: Write a function called count_vowels that counts vowels (a, e, i, o, u), case-insensitive.

title: area rectangle
prompt: Write a function called area_rectangle that returns width * height.

title: clamp value
prompt: Write a function called clamp that keeps value between low and high.

title: average
prompt: Write a function called average that returns the mean of a list of numbers.

title: find duplicates
prompt: Write a function called duplicates that returns a list of duplicate elements in a list.

title: remove duplicates
prompt: Write a function called duplicates that returns a list of elements in a list after removing duplicates.

title: n in between
prompt:
Write a function called nbetween that returns n number of spaces in between 2 characters of a string.
For example, nbetween(3, 'ab') should return 'a   b'.
